headline: Valero Energy (VLO) Stock After 96% One‑Year Surge Is There Still Value
summary: Investors may be wondering if Valero Energy at around US$255.60 is still offering value after a strong run, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in. The stock has eased about 1.3% over the past week, but is up 3.4% over 30 days, 54.6% year to date and 96.4% over the last year, with returns over three and five years of 144.4% and 283.7% respectively. This naturally raises questions about risk and valuation today. Recent coverage has focused on how large integrated refiners are...
